title: ononis viscosa subsp. porrigens
intro: Ononis viscosa subsp. porrigens, also known as the sticky gromwell or sticky ononis, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. It is primarily used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic properties. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including kidney stones, urinary tract infections, and skin conditions, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and improve urine flow. Herbal preparations of Ononis viscosa subsp. porrigens include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support kidney health and alleviate symptoms associated with urinary problems.
